steps.title: Fit the whole table
steps.content: Enter the four table points into Desmos and run the linear regression $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. The values fall exactly on one line, and Desmos gives $m=-4$ and $b=36$.

steps.title: Use the intercept
steps.content: In $g(x)=mx+b$, $b$ is $g(0)$, the $y$-intercept. The fitted line is $g(x)=-4x+36$, so $b=36$. That matches choice D.
